zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Courtenay於1261年出生在英國戴文奧可哈普頓時，她的父親Sir Hugh Courtenay, Feudal Baron of Oakhampton10歲，母親Eleanor Despencer10歲。她於大約1281年與Henry de Grey 1st Baron在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國德比夏爾可德諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Courtenay于1261年出生在英国戴文奧可哈普頓时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Courtenay, Feudal Baron of Oakhampton10岁，母亲Eleanor Despencer10岁。她于大约1281年与Henry de Grey 1st Baron在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国德比夏爾可德諾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Courtenay was born in 1261, in Okehampton, Devon, England, her father, Sir Hugh Courtenay, Feudal Baron of Oakhampton, was 10 and her mother, Eleanor Despencer, was 10. She married Henry de Grey 1st Baron about 1281, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She was buried in Codnor, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Courtenay est née en 1261, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Courtenay, Feudal Baron of Oakhampton, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Despencer, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Grey 1st Baron environ 1281, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elleenterrée à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Courtenay 1261 in Okehampton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Courtenay, Feudal Baron of Oakhampton 10 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Despencer 10. Sie hat um 1281 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Henry de Grey 1st Baron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie wurde in Codnor, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Courtenay è nata il nel 1261 nel Okehampton, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh Courtenay, Feudal Baron of Oakhampton, aveva 10 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Despencer, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Grey 1st Baron circa 1281, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Fu sepolta a Codnor, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Courtenayが1261年にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Courtenay, Feudal Baron of Oakhamptonは10歳，母Eleanor Despencerは10歳であった。約1281年にイギリスイギリスデボンでHenry de Grey 1st Baronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Courtenay(이)가 1261년 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Courtenay, Feudal Baron of Oakhampton(은)는 10세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Despencer(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 대략 1281년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Henry de Grey 1st Baron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 더비실르 코드너에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Courtenay nasceu em 1261, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Courtenay, Feudal Baron of Oakhampton, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Despencer, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Grey 1st Baron aproximadamente 1281, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Courtenay родилась в 1261 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Courtenay, Feudal Baron of Oakhampton было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Despencer, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Grey 1st Baron около 1281 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Courtenay nació en 1261, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Courtenay, Feudal Baron of Oakhampton, tenía 10 años y su mamá, Eleanor Despencer, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Henry de Grey 1st Baron aproximadamente 1281, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Fue sepultada en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
